chunks.title: Ezekiel's Exile Sign
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the prophet performing a physical sign of exile.

chunks.title: Interpretation of the Sign
chunks.reason: Divine explanation of the sign's meaning regarding the prince and the people.

chunks.title: Eating with Trembling
chunks.reason: Narrative of the prophet eating and drinking in anxiety as a sign.

chunks.title: The Proverb Fulfilled
chunks.reason: Oracle addressing the proverb about delayed visions and their immediate fulfillment.

chunks.title: No More Delayed Words
chunks.reason: Oracle concluding that God's words will no longer be delayed.
